typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts: Playfair Display (400,500,700), Manrope (300,400,500,700), JetBrains Mono (400)

layout_strategy.border_radius: rounded-none (Sharp corners for architectural feel) or rounded-sm (2px)

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white hover:bg-[#E65100] transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-4 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-mono border border-transparent
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 px-8 py-4 rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-mono
buttons.ghost: text-[#666666] hover:text-[#E65100] transition-colors duration-200 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.diagnosis: bg-white border border-gray-100 hover:border-[#E65100] hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-500 p-8 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.stat: bg-[#F5F5F5] p-6 border-l-2 border-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-white hover:shadow-lg transition-all

timeline.line: w-[1px] bg-gray-200 h-full absolute left-0 md:left-1/2
timeline.marker: w-4 h-4 bg-[#E65100] rounded-full border-4 border-white z-10

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle concrete grain overlay on light backgrounds (opacity 0.05)
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only for floating diagnosis panels: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/40 shadow-2xl

image_urls.barugel_logo_placeholder: Use text 'BARUGEL' in 'Playfair Display' font if SVG unavailable
image_urls.wtf_logo_placeholder: Use text 'WTF AGENCY' in 'JetBrains Mono' font

page_structure.header: Transparent fixed nav, blurring on scroll. Logo left, minimal links right.
page_structure.hero: Split screen or Tetris Grid. Left: 'Transformando 90 Años de Historia'. Right: High-end marble/bathroom image. Scroll indicator: 'Explorar'.
page_structure.situation_analysis: Section Title: 'Diagnóstico Actual'. Interactive cards showing pain points vs opportunities. Hover to reveal data.
page_structure.competitive_landscape: Section Title: 'Panorama Competitivo'. Comparison chart (Radar or Bar) comparing Barugel vs Competitors on Digital Maturity.
page_structure.solution_timeline: Section Title: 'La Transformación: 3 Fases'. Vertical scrollytelling. Phase 1: Foundation. Phase 2: Growth. Phase 3: Domination. Progress bar animates on scroll.
page_structure.investment: Section Title: 'Inversión & Estructura'. Clean pricing table, architectural drawing style lines. 'ROI Proyectado' highlighted in Orange.
page_structure.results_dashboard: Section Title: 'Resultados Proyectados'. Bento Grid dashboard. Animated counters for 'Conversion Rate', 'Traffic', 'Revenue'.
page_structure.footer: Simple, large typography. 'Construyamos el Futuro'. No contact form (as per request), just Agency credits.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-gray-400 is only for non-critical labels. Use text-gray-600 for body.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Wrap all framer-motion components in MotionConfig to respect prefers-reduced-motion.

universal_guidelines.component_reuse: Prioritize shadcn/ui. Customize radii to 0px or 2px. Use 'sonner' for toasts.
universal_guidelines.interaction: Micro-animations on EVERY clickable element. No dead clicks.
universal_guidelines.testing: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement using React + Tailwind. Use Framer Motion for scroll animations (parallax, reveal). Ensure the 'Italian Modern' feel comes from Typography (Playfair) and Spacing (Generous), not just images. Keep it premium, strict grids, architectural.
